## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `python -m py_compile` on all changed Python files
- [ ] I have run `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit` (if frontend changes)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] My code follows the existing code style
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
